use_cases: Displaying status labels like online/offline or active/inactive states
Tagging content with category badges for visual organization
Showing notification counts or feature labels in compact format
Indicating product status or availability in e-commerce contexts
Creating feature announcement pills in marketing materials
ai_summary: A versatile badge component for displaying status labels and categorical information. Features multiple variants including default, secondary, destructive, and outline styles with hover and focus interactions. Built with class-variance-authority for flexible styling.
